name: ClinkNOORD

reviews.notes:
Very expensive for what you get, but still cheaper than other hostels in Amsterdam.

The 14 bed rooms are far too crammed and unhygienic.  They get fans in the room so they’re running all night and people leave food lying around. The back of the rooms are also very dark and crammed in a corner.

My locker was smaller than all others and only fit a small bag. It was also coming off the hinges.

Not many showers and most smell of urine, but they’re spacious at least lol.

Location is a 10

description:
Welcome to ClinkNOORD!
Just a short, free ferry ride from Amsterdam Central Station, ClinkNOORD is set in the lively and cultural Amsterdam Noord area. Our hostel combines Dutch charm with modern creativity, offering unique social spaces like a leafy atrium, cozy café, library, and ZincBAR, which hosts live music and performances. We also offer daily events, from morning yoga classes to cocktail-making workshops. Our friendly, multilingual staff are always ready with local tips to help you make the most of your Amsterdam adventure.
Choose from a variety of accommodations, including mixed and girls-only dorms (4-14 beds) with or without en-suites, and private rooms ranging from single to double, some with stunning views. Each bed features a reading light, USB port, and secure locker. Start your day with our all-you-can-eat buffet breakfast (€9.90), available 7-10.30AM (Mon-Fri) and 8-11.30AM (Sat-Sun). Stay connected with free Wi-Fi throughout the hostel and take advantage of our coin-operated laundry facilities (€4.50 per cycle).
For your safety, we offer 24/7 key card access, bed lockboxes, and additional lockers at reception. While we don’t have on-site parking, nearby options include Asterweg and Distelweg for €1.40 per hour (free from 7pm to 9am) and the secure ADAM Toren / EYE Filmmuseum garage (€1.15 per 20 minutes / €44 per 24 hours). Please review our Terms & Conditions before booking and contact us directly for group bookings of 10 or more guests. For cancellations or changes, email us at least 24 hours before arrival to avoid charges. Looking forward to welcoming you to ClinkNOORD!
directions:
ClinkNOORD is located in Badhuiskade in Amsterdam Noord. With Centraal Station only a 5-10 minutes journey away, the hostel is well connected to the heart of Amsterdam.

From Amsterdam Centraal Station

When you arrive at Centraal Station, follow the signs to the ferries. From here, jump on the free ferry (24/7) to Veer Buiksloterweg which only takes 5 minutes and runs every 7 minutes (departs every 15 minutes during the night). From the boat, ClinkNOORD is only 400m away.

When you get off the ferry, turn left straight away. Walk straight ahead across the bridge towards the EYE Film Museum and the ADAM Tower. Once you've crossed the bridge, turn right immediately and walk straight along the canal, with The Butcher restaurant on your left. Keep following the canal for about 50 meters and ClinkNOORD will be on your left. It's a big brown building with a CLINK sign outside, you can't miss it!

depositOnly.description: This property has a 1 day cancellation policy. Failure to cancel within this time will result in a cancellation charge equal to the first night of your stay, unless otherwise stated (see 'Things to Note' information).

nonRefundable.description: Your booking is non-refundable. If you choose to cancel your booking, or in the case of a no-show, you will still be charged the full cost of your booking.

freeCancellation.description: Your booking can be cancelled for free, if you cancel your booking 24 hours before arrival your deposit will be refunded to your payment card.  If you cancel within 24 hours, your deposit will not be refunded and the the total of the first night's accommodation will be charged to your payment card.

thingsToNote:
CHECK-IN/OUT: 
Check in from 3pm
Check out up to 10am.
Please make sure to bring valid photo identification with you, a passport, government-issued I.D. card or driving license - no photocopies will be accepted.

AGE RESTRICTIONS: 
Bookings cannot be accepted from any person under the age of 18 unless they are accompanied by an adult (18 or over). Guests who wish to bring their children under 16 years of age must book a whole dorm or private room. For guests aged 16 or 17 years of age, they can book into one of dorm rooms but must be accompanied by an adult (aged 18 or over).

BREAKFAST: 
Breakfast is not included in the price.
Breakfast from 9.9 EUR per adult. You need to contact the hostel to book your breakfast. 
Breakfast is served between 7.00 AM and 10.30 AM on weekdays and between 08.00 AM and 11.30 AM on weekends. 

CANCELLATION POLICIES:
Non-Refundable rate: this rate offers no flexibility. Non-refundable bookings cannot be changed or cancelled are prepaid. Full payment is required at the time of booking. 
Fully Flexible rate: This rate offers full flexibility on your booking up to 24hrs prior to arrival. The total price of the booking will be charged 24hrs before arrival.

GENERAL: 
Non-smoking hostel.
24-hour reception.
Towels are provided only specific rooms, such as private rooms. For other room types, towels can be rented for a small fee. Guests are also welcome to bring their own towels. 
There is no onsite parking available.
No pets or animals are allowed, apart from guide dogs. Please contact the hostel form more information. 
Maximum stay of 14 days

TAXES: 
City tax is not included in the room rate and will be added to your balance. Please note that the city tax of Amsterdam is 12.5%. 

ACCESSIBILITY: 
Some of our private Quad/Family rooms available for wheelchair users. These rooms are located near the elevator and can accommodate up to four people (with one double bed and two single beds in bunks). Please contact the hostel for more information, their reservations team will be happy to provide you more information.

GROUPS POLCIY: 
Group conditions apply to all groups of 20 people or more.  Special terms and conditions will apply for group bookings. We recommend you contact the hostel for more information. 
Age restriction: Guests must be 15+ years old for arrival between March and October (included) and 12+ years old from November through February (request ONLY - we will need to be told at the time of booking).
Payment policy: 
Non-refundable rate: Full payment is required within 24 hours of confirming the booking regardless of the rate type selected.
Flexible rate: 20% of the total amount is due immediately after booking confirmation.  This amount is non-refundable. The balance equal to the remaining 80% of the amount is due within 30 days before arrival.

groupInformation.additionalTerms:
You will be asked to pay a 20% non-refundable deposit within the week of your booking.

One group leader will be required to give a credit card upon arrival for a “Group Deposit”. This will need to be the card holder. We will pre-authorize the card for £300 in case of breakage or for not respecting coach stopping/parking rules.

Full T&Cs will be emailed to you at the time of booking
groupInformation.cancellationTerms:
28+ days before arrival: the 20% deposit paid will not be refunded
-28 days before arrival: no-refund given
groupInformation.groupTerms:
● Groups of more than 15 pax booking through this website will be required to pay a 20% deposit at the time of booking which is non-refundable. The remaining balance will have to be paid 4 weeks prior to arrival
● We accept groups from age 12+. 
● One group leader will be required to give a credit card upon arrival for a “Group Deposit”. This will need to be the cardholder. We will pre-authorize the card for £300 in case of breakage or for not respecting coach stopping/parking rules.
● If your group is arriving by coach, make sure to contact us for information on where to stop and park.
● If you do not inform us by email on groups@clinkhostels.com when booking we cannot guarantee for your group to be in the same rooms and depending on availability your booking might be cancelled.
